rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be scoped to their owning component declaration
Use assign only for implementation-level output bindings with visible features
generic_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when using visible feature names and concrete bounds
Write output dependency guarantees that relate visible inputs to visible outputs
Component type contracts should not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE syntax uses assume/guarantee labels with expressions, eq for equations, const for constants, and assign for output bindings
AGREE contracts are enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties like Deadline or Period as AGREE variables
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
